title: Install A-Axis Sensor And Connect Wiring To PCA
summary: Mount the A-axis sensor on the rear side, route the A-axis wire around the gearbox, connect the wire to the PCA, and then restart the operator station using the referenced startup procedure.
when_to_use: Use this procedure when installing the A-axis sensor and connecting its wiring to the PCA as documented in the OptiSweep Operation and Maintenance Manual section 7.3.2.1.2 Installation.
not_for: Do not use this runbook for Z-axis sensor wiring or CLINK connections.
Do not use this runbook when the operator station restart procedure on page 66 is unavailable.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Perform the sensor installation, wire routing, PCA connection, and operator station restart reference step.

safety_notes: This procedure is not marked support-safe in the candidate.
Do not proceed if the rear wire routing hole, gearbox routing path, or PCA connection point cannot be positively identified from the available source material.
access_or_tools_needed: Physical access to the sensor mounting location
Access to the rear-side wire routing hole
Access to the gearbox area and PCA
Referenced procedure: Starting The Operator Station

access_required: Physical access to the sensor mounting location
Access to the rear-side wire routing hole
Access to the gearbox area and PCA
system_preconditions: Replacement or target A-axis sensor is available for installation.
Figure 7-3 is available for identifying routing and PCA connection points.
The referenced operator station startup procedure on page 66 is available before performing the restart step.

visual_references.description: Primary installation diagram showing A-axis PCA connections and supporting the routing and connection steps.

steps.title: Mount the A-axis sensor at the rear wire routing hole
steps.purpose: Position and secure the A-axis sensor in its documented installation location.
steps.instruction: Feed the sensor through the wire routing hole on the rear side and fasten it in place using the M3 button-head screw.
steps.expected_result: The A-axis sensor is installed at the rear-side mounting location and secured with the M3 button-head screw.
steps.healthy_condition: The sensor is fed through the rear wire routing hole and is fastened in place.
steps.failure_condition: The rear wire routing hole or mounting location cannot be identified, or the sensor cannot be fastened in place with the specified M3 button-head screw.

actions.label: Feed sensor through rear routing hole
actions.exact_action: Feed the sensor through the wire routing hole on the rear side.

actions.label: Fasten sensor with M3 screw
actions.exact_action: Fasten it in place using the M3 button-head screw.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Use the A-axis PCA connections figure as the packet-supported visual reference associated with this installation section.

stop_or_escalate_if: The installer cannot identify the rear wire routing hole from the available source material.
The installer cannot identify the sensor mounting location from the available source material.

source_evidence.text: Feed the sensor through the wire routing hole on the rear side and fasten it in place using the M3 button-head screw.
The nearby installation steps state that the sensor is fed through the wire routing hole on the rear side and fastened with an M3 button-head screw.

steps.title: Route the A-axis wire around the gearbox
steps.purpose: Place the A-axis wire along the documented path before connection to the PCA.
steps.instruction: Route the A-axis wire around the gearbox.
steps.expected_result: The A-axis wire follows the documented routing path around the gearbox.
steps.healthy_condition: The wire is routed around the gearbox as shown in the source-supported A-axis PCA connections figure.
steps.failure_condition: The gearbox routing path cannot be identified or the wire cannot be routed as documented.

actions.label: Route wire around gearbox
actions.exact_action: Route the A-axis wire around the gearbox.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Look for the A-axis wire routing path around the gearbox shown in Figure 7-3.

stop_or_escalate_if: The installer cannot identify the gearbox routing path from the available source material.

source_evidence.text: Route the A-axis wire around the gearbox.
The nearby installation steps state ... that A-axis wires route around the gearbox and plug into the PCA.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Figure 7-3 appears on page 107 in section optisweep_operation_and_maintenance_manual_final_1_7_3_2_1_2_installation.

steps.title: Plug the A-axis wire into the PCA
steps.purpose: Complete the documented electrical connection for the installed A-axis sensor.
steps.instruction: Plug the A-axis wire into the PCA.
steps.expected_result: The A-axis wire is connected to the PCA at the documented connection point.
steps.healthy_condition: The A-axis wire is plugged into the PCA as indicated by Figure 7-3.
steps.failure_condition: The PCA connection point cannot be identified or the wire cannot be connected as documented.

actions.label: Connect wire to PCA
actions.exact_action: Plug the A-axis wire into the PCA.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Look for the PCA connection point for the A-axis wire in Figure 7-3.

stop_or_escalate_if: The installer cannot identify the PCA connection point from the available source material.

source_evidence.text: Plug the A-axis wire into the PCA.
The nearby installation steps state ... that A-axis wires route around the gearbox and plug into the PCA.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Figure 7-3 appears on page 107 in section optisweep_operation_and_maintenance_manual_final_1_7_3_2_1_2_installation.

steps.title: Restart the operator station
steps.purpose: Return the operator station to service using the referenced startup procedure after installation is complete.
steps.instruction: Re-start the operator station using the referenced startup procedure on page 66.
steps.expected_result: The operator station is restarted using the referenced startup procedure.
steps.healthy_condition: The operator station restart is completed using the referenced procedure.
steps.failure_condition: The referenced operator station restart procedure is not available.

actions.label: Restart operator station per referenced procedure
actions.exact_action: Re-start the operator station using the referenced startup procedure on page 66.

stop_or_escalate_if: The referenced operator station restart procedure is not available.

source_evidence.text: Re-start the operator station using the referenced startup procedure on page 66.
The restart step references another procedure on page 66 rather than restating it here.

success_criteria: The A-axis sensor is mounted at the rear-side location.
The A-axis wire is routed around the gearbox.
The A-axis wire is plugged into the PCA.
The operator station is restarted using the referenced startup procedure.
healthy_conditions: Sensor is fastened in place using the M3 button-head screw.
Wire routing follows the documented path around the gearbox.
PCA connection is made at the documented A-axis connection point.
Operator station restart is completed using the referenced procedure.
failure_conditions: Rear wire routing hole cannot be identified from the available source material.
Gearbox routing path cannot be identified from the available source material.
PCA connection point cannot be identified from the available source material.
Referenced operator station restart procedure is not available.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the installer cannot identify the rear wire routing hole, gearbox routing path, or PCA connection point from the available source material.
Escalate if the referenced operator station restart procedure is not available.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: A-axis PCA connections, routing around the gearbox, and PCA connection point.
